decision_notes: Append-only fast path is correctly exercised (counter fires 10 times per chat run) but the work it skips is microseconds — dwarfed by the millisecond cloneNode cost. Bisect-verified: same SHA, stash-on/off both produce 182ms median on chat. Zero shuffle regression. Worth re-evaluating with a 10k+ row stress journey where LIS iteration cost would surface above the noise floor.

environment.notes: noisy host (~30 concurrent worktrees + dev servers); 1ms wall-clock jitter is typical
